bodyPatterns.equalToJson:
{
  "model" : "orca-mini",
  "messages" : [ {
    "role" : "user",
    "content" : "Describe the Miles of Camels Car Rental cancellations policy for cancelling 24 hours before pickup. What is the refund amount?

Answer using the following information:
Miles of Camels Car Rental - Company Information

BUSINESS HOURS:
Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

RENTAL AGREEMENT
- This agreement is between Miles of Camels Car Rental ("Company") and the customer ("Renter").

CANCELLATION POLICY
- Cancellations made 24 hours before pickup: Full refund
- Cancellations made 12-24 hours before pickup: 50% refund
- Cancellations made less than 12 hours before pickup: No refund

VEHICLE RETURN
- Vehicles must be returned with the same fuel level as at pickup.
- Late returns incur a fee of $25 per hour or fraction thereof.

DAMAGE POLICY
- Minor damages under $200: Covered by insurance
- Major damages over $200: Customer responsibility"
  } ],
  "options" : {
    "temperature" : 0.3,
    "stop" : [ ]
  },
  "stream" : false,
  "tools" : [ ]
}

response.body:
{"model":"orca-mini","created_at":"2026-04-23T06:59:26.335758228Z","message":{"role":"assistant","content":" Miles of Camels Car Rental cancellations policy for cancelling 24 hours before pickup is as follows:

- If you cancel 24 hours or more before pickup, you will receive a full refund.
- If you cancel 12-24 hours before pickup, you will receive 50% refund.
- If you cancel less than 12 hours before pickup, you will not receive a refund.

The refund amount will be the total amount paid by the Renter for the rental vehicle.

Additionally, Miles of Camels Car Rental has a damage policy where minor damages under $200 are covered by insurance, while major damages over $200 are the responsibility of the customer. Late returns incur a fee of $25 per hour or fraction thereof."},"done":true,"done_reason":"stop","total_duration":13426245093,"load_duration":1335757667,"prompt_eval_count":314,"prompt_eval_duration":3626895911,"eval_count":170,"eval_duration":8449762583}
